creator: tphilipp@potion-studios.com
text:
Hi,

thanks for the patch and the upgrade to 0.2.2.8. Unfortunately, I don't have a possibility to runtime test this right now, but from just building it, patch-common-refresh_mrtg.php doesn't apply anymore, b/c the source file (common/refresh_mrtg.php) is gone in 0.2.2.8.
As you seem to use the port at the moment, would you mind checking this and fixing the build?
I'll probably get around testing it in a week or two.

btw... awesome that I'm not the only guifi guy on freebsd :)

Thanks
